title: Id-typed destroyed field in AppEvent: defends against silent String normalization bypass
description: Using Vec<jmap_chat::jmap::Id> for destroyed rather than Vec<String> is worth keeping: Id's non-empty validation fires at parse time, so a server that returns an empty-string ID will fail loudly at deserialization rather than silently matching nothing in the retain() call. A contributor who suggests 'simplify this back to Vec<String>' loses that invariant.
